utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: 1) destination: Prague, fully specified; 2) travel_dates: May 15–19, 2024, fully specified; 3) transportation: includes flight details and cost (€400), fully specified; 4) accommodation: includes hotel name, details, and cost (€750), fully specified; 5) activities: three activities listed with individual costs, fully specified; 6) additional_services: allergy-safe dining and golf partnerships, but no cost is provided—partially specified; 7) total_budget: total and note about being within budget, fully specified. Therefore, 6 of 7 items are fully specified.
